doInBackground() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker
Applies the median filter to every slice of the ImageStack using ImageJ's RankFilters.MEDIAN rank filter.
doInBackground() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.PreprocessingPreviewMedianWorker
Applies the median filter to a single ImageProcessor (the current slice preview), using ImageJ's RankFilters.MEDIAN rank filter.
